content.en:
Ye Tian was seriously injured at the moment and looked very embarrassed, but he was very excited, with a smile on his face.

He is already the Lord of the Wasteland.

So, he was not afraid of anything.

What if you are seriously injured?

He can now completely control the power of the Wasteland, depriving these innate gods of their control over the power of the Wasteland, so the strength of these innate gods has dropped greatly one by one, and they are not his opponents at all.

Thus, the battle ended.

"Surrender, or you'll all die!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Let's surrender to an outside Heavenly Venerable, impossible!"

A supreme-level innate deity spoke.

At this time, Ye Tianyi waved his hand, and the power of the Wasteland restrained the other party.

"Die!"

Ye Tian only lightly pointed, and the supreme was wiped out without any resistance.

This scene completely stunned many innate gods, and they were all dumbfounded.

They wanted to control the power of the Wasteland, but they found that they couldn't control the power of the Wasteland at all, and their strength had dropped greatly, and they couldn't resist Ye Tian at all.

"We lost!"

Aramazun sighed.

"Huang Zun, do you still want to resist?" Ye Tian asked.

"I'm willing to surrender!"

Aramazun bent down.

The person who knows the times is Junjie, he naturally understands this truth, if he can kill Ye Tian, he will definitely kill Ye Tian at all costs.

But now, they failed to kill Ye Tian, Ye Tian successfully controlled the Wasteland, and there was no point in them resisting.

Huangzun didn't want to die, so naturally he wouldn't resist Ye Tian.

"Very good, although you just tried to kill me, but I am a very angry person, I won't do anything to you, after all, the wasteland still needs you to guard and maintain, so I won't kill you!"

Ye Tiandao.

This is not a lie, but the truth.

These innate gods are also a very powerful force, if you kill all these innate gods, it will be easy for people from the outside world to attack them, and he alone may not be able to compete with those foreign supremes.

The reason why he can ignore this group of innate gods is that he can deprive these innate gods of the ability to control the power of the desolate realm, if this group of innate gods is allowed to use the power of the desolate realm, Ye Tian is still not an opponent.

Therefore, this group of innate gods is very important and is a good help for them.

In addition, he needed to cultivate often, and he was too lazy to manage the desolate realm, so he had to leave this group of innate gods behind.

"I'll heal first, you guys retreat first!"

Ye Tiandao.

Many innate gods hesitated for a moment, and then they retreated one after another, not daring to make a mistake.

No matter how seriously Ye Tian was injured, they had no hope of winning, so they had better retreat honestly, otherwise the fate of the dead innate god just now would be their fate.

After the innate gods retreated, Ye Tian began to heal his injuries on the spot, and while using his healing talents to recover his injuries, he also took a large amount of healing medicine.

But even so, Ye Tian also felt that the wounds on the body and soul of the second deity were very serious, and it was a little difficult to completely repair it.

"The potential of the second deity has almost been exhausted, and it is difficult to continue to improve, but the value of the second deity is enough!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

A few years have passed in the blink of an eye, and Ye Tian has almost repaired the second deity, as for the deeper injuries, it is a little difficult, and he is too lazy to repair it.

this day.

Ye Tian summoned several ancient innate gods in the Desolate Realm, and Desolate Venerable was also one of them.

He didn't immediately let the main body come to the Wasteland, but first learned about the situation in the Wasteland.

meeting.

Ye Tian asked the Desolate Realm: "Desolate Venerable, you are the oldest supreme in the Desolate Realm, you should know more about the Desolate Realm, I only know that the Desolate Realm is left by the Innate Desolate Clan, and I don't know much about the others!"

Desolate Zun said truthfully: "Realm Lord, in fact, we don't know much about the Desolate Realm, the Desolate Realm is indeed left by the Congenital Desolate Clan, and the Congenital Desolate Clan seems to be a race in the Fifth Universe Era, but the Congenital Desolate Clan is actually an innate desolate, and it is the first batch of innate desolate spirits to combine and form a congenital desolate clan, and then create a lot of bloodline clansmen, forming a powerful race." So many of our innate gods have also obtained a lot of information from the Wasteland, including detailed information about the Wasteland. Based on what we know, it doesn't seem that the Desolate Realm was built by the Innate Desolate Clan!"

"The Wasteland wasn't built by the Innate Desolate Clan?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

"Yes, it wasn't built by the Innate Desolate Clan!" Desolate Zun said: "Only the Desolate Tower is the strongest treasure built by the Innate Desolate Clan, and the Desolate Realm is not. With the strength of the innate desolate clan, it is not possible to build a storage world like the desolate world, although the desolate world is not a chaotic treasure, but it is the top chaos spirit treasure, from the level of the strongest treasure is about the same, but it is still more powerful than the strongest treasure, after all, the limit of the chaos spirit treasure can be higher than the limit of the strongest treasure. "

"Chaos Spirit Treasure, could it be that it comes from Chaos?"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

The Chaos Spirit Treasure is a division of weapons under the Chaos Arcana in the chaos, which is theoretically at the same level as the Supreme Treasure, but its value is one level higher than the Supreme Treasure.

"That's right, the wasteland does come from chaos, it was swallowed into the universe by the universe in a chaotic tide in the fifth universe era, and then discovered and occupied by the innate desolate race. This secret is known to very few people even in the Fifth Universe Era, they only think that the Desolate Realm was built by the Innate Desolate Clan, but in fact, it is just a rumor deliberately released by the Innate Desolate Clan. It is precisely because of the Desolate Realm that the Innate Desolate Clan has become so powerful!" Araven explained.

"I see!"

Ye Tian somewhat understood.

He had some doubts before, if the Innate Desolate Clan could really build such a terrifying Desolate Realm, why didn't one of the forces of the Twelve Cosmic Epochs have an Innate Desolate Clan.

After all, the Innate Desolate Clan is really so powerful, it must become the overlord of the cosmic era, and there is no reason not to know the way to avoid the great destruction of the universe.

Now he finally knew the reason, the Innate Desolate Clan was not very powerful, but just occupied the Desolate Realm by luck.

"Desolate Venerable, can't you refine the Desolate Tower?"

Ye Tian asked again.

In his opinion, the Wasted Tower is just a supreme treasure, and these supremes should be able to refine the Wasteland Tower.

"Realm Lord, we can't refine the Desolate Tower!" "Desolate Zun hurriedly said: "The Desolate Tower and the Desolate Realm are integrated, we can't refine it at all, but the Realm Lord should be able to refine the Desolate Tower!"

"That's it!"

Ye Tian understood.

Then, after asking some questions, he asked the Arazun and the other innate gods to leave.

But he also gave them a task, which was to declare his existence and make all the races of the wasteland worship him as their lord.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Wasteland Tower, and he was ready to refine the Wasteland Tower!
